text_raw: Ah, so Wells' lackey has decided to show himself.
text_clean: Ah, so Wells' lackey has decided to show himself.

text_raw: He does not deserve such a vast domain.
text_clean: He does not deserve such a vast domain.

text_raw: Once righteousness is served, all will move to my command.
text_clean: Once righteousness is served, all will move to my command.

text_raw: So eager to die in a fight already lost?
text_clean: So eager to die in a fight already lost?

text_raw: Soon, even you will break beneath the weight of my power!
text_clean: Soon, even you will break beneath the weight of my power!

text_raw: Shielding Wells is not worth the breath it costs you.
text_clean: Shielding Wells is not worth the breath it costs you.

text_raw: Why pledge yourself to such a weak and broken master?
text_clean: Why pledge yourself to such a weak and broken master?
